name: mnemion
description: Give your AI a memory — mine projects and conversations into a searchable Anaktoron. 29 MCP tools, auto-save hooks, and guided setup.

interface.longDescription: Give your AI a persistent memory — mine projects and conversations into a searchable Anaktoron backed by ChromaDB, with 29 MCP tools, auto-save hooks, and guided skills.
defaultPrompt: Search my memories for recent decisions
Mine this project into my memory Anaktoron
